about.title: About Vision Coaching
about.subtitle: Building Bright Futures Since Day One
about.body: Vision Coaching Institute in Tulsipur has been shaping the academic futures of students from Classes 6 to 12. Our expert faculty, personalized approach, and proven methodology have helped hundreds of students achieve top results in CBSE, ICSE, ISC, and UP Board examinations.
about.visionBody: To be the most trusted coaching institute in Tulsipur — empowering every student with knowledge, confidence, and the skills to excel in board exams and beyond.

testimonials.title: What Students Say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from our students and parents

reviews.name: Ramesh Kumar (Parent)
reviews.text: My son's marks improved drastically after joining Vision Coaching. The teachers are very dedicated.

reviews.name: Sneha Pandey
reviews.text: The doubt solving sessions are amazing. I cleared all my concepts before the board exams.

reviews.name: Mohit Srivastava
reviews.text: Best coaching in Tulsipur! Weekly tests helped me track my progress throughout the year.

reviews.name: Pooja Sharma (Parent)
reviews.text: Small batch size means my daughter gets personal attention. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Ankit Dubey
reviews.text: The faculty is very experienced and always available for doubt clearing. Got 94% in boards!
